emails.subject: RE: Re-start/Integration Planning
emails.body: RE: Re-start/Integration Planning Louise- Any notion of amount of risk bidders are comfy with, both credit and market? I doubt anything specific has been discussed but have any ranges been thrown out. Hope all is well. Happy New Year. Rick

emails.subject: RE: Re-start/Integration Planning
emails.body: I would assume 30mm for planning purposes

emails.subject: RE: Re-start/Integration Planning
emails.body: Happy New Year by the way.
